buildCommand: npx expo export --platform web && node scripts/postbuild-web.js

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://covers.openlibrary.org; connect-src 'self' https://openlibrary.org https://covers.openlibrary.org; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
